raw_source.title: [HK/Remote] SynFutures Company is looking for Smart Contract Developer
raw_source.body:
## About
A rapidly growing decentralized derivatives protocol (DeFi) with over $70b cumulative trading volume.
Distributed team of crypto natives, ex-Wall Street veterans, and blockchain technology experts.
Backed by top-tier tech investors, including Pantera Capital, Polychain, SIG, Framework, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, and Hashkey Capital.
## Responsibilities
Designing,  modeling,  implementing,  and  maintaining  a  fully  on-chain 
derivatives DEX.
## Requirements
1. Have a in-depth understanding of blockchain technology, smart contract 
development, and DeFi protocols. 
2. With backgrounds in mathematics or financial engineering are highly 
desirable. 
3. Minimum  of  2  years  of  experience  in  building  and  deploying 
production-level  Solidity  contracts  is  required.  However,  this 
requirement  may  be  flexible  for  exceptional  fresh  graduates 
demonstrating outstanding potential. 
4. Proficiency in Solidity is required, along with expertise in at least one 
other non-smart-contract language, preferably JavaScript/TypeScript or 
Python. 
5. Comprehensive  knowledge  of  the  Uniswap V2  protocol  is  essential, 
while  familiarity  with  Uniswap  V3  will  be  considered  a  significant 
advantage. 
6. Stay updated with the latest DeFi technology and industry trends, along 
with  a  solid  understanding  of  the  economic  principles  behind 
mainstream DeFi products. 
7. Excellent  communication  and  teamwork  abilities,  robust  logical 
thinking skills, adherence to good coding practices, and proficiency in 
technical documentation are essential. 
## Nice to Haves

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: HK/Remote

## Salary and Benefits
HKD 35K+

## Work Location
HK/Remote
## Contact
[hiring@synfutures.com](mailto:hiring@synfutures.com)

narrative: ## About A rapidly growing decentralized derivatives protocol (DeFi) with over $70b cumulative trading volume. Distributed team of crypto natives, ex-Wall Street veterans, and blockchain technology experts. Backed by top-tier tech investors, including Pantera Capital, Polychain, SIG, Framework, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, and Hashkey Capital. ## Responsibilities Designing, modeling, implementing, and maintaining a fully on-chain derivatives DEX. ## Requirements 1. Have a in-depth understanding of blockchain technology, smart contract development, and DeFi protocols. 2. With backgrounds in mathematics or financial engineering are highly desirable. 3. Minimum of 2 years of experience in building and deploying production-level Solidity contracts is required. However, this requirement may be flexible for exceptional fresh graduates demonstrating outstanding potential. 4. Proficiency in Solidity is required, along with expertise in at least one other non-smart-contract language, preferably JavaScript/TypeScript or Python. 5. Comprehensive knowledge of the Uniswap V2 protocol is essential, while familiarity with Uniswap V3 will be considered a significant advantage. 6. Stay updated with the latest DeFi technology and industry trends, along with a solid understanding of the economic principles behind mainstream DeFi products. 7. Excellent communication and teamwork abilities, robust logical thinking skills, adherence to good coding practices, and proficiency in technical documentation are essential. ## Nice to Haves
- Full-time or not: Full-time - Remote or not: HK/Remote

## About
A rapidly growing decentralized derivatives protocol (DeFi) with over $70b cumulative trading volume.
Distributed team of crypto natives, ex-Wall Street veterans, and blockchain technology experts.
Backed by top-tier tech investors, including Pantera Capital, Polychain, SIG, Framework, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, and Hashkey Capital.
## Responsibilities

derivatives DEX.
## Requirements
1. Have a in-depth understanding of blockchain technology, smart contract 
development, and DeFi protocols. 
2. With backgrounds in mathematics or financial engineering are highly 
desirable. 
3. Minimum  of  2  years  of  experience  in  building  and  deploying 
production-level  Solidity  contracts  is  required.  However,  this 
requirement  may  be  flexible  for  exceptional  fresh  graduates 
demonstrating outstanding potential. 
4. Proficiency in Solidity is required, along with expertise in at least one 
other non-smart-contract language, preferably JavaScript/TypeScript or 
Python. 
5. Comprehensive  knowledge  of  the  Uniswap V2  protocol  is  essential, 
while  familiarity  with  Uniswap  V3  will  be  considered  a  significant 
advantage. 
6. Stay updated with the latest DeFi technology and industry trends, along 
with  a  solid  understanding  of  the  economic  principles  behind 
mainstream DeFi products. 
7. Excellent  communication  and  teamwork  abilities,  robust  logical 
thinking skills, adherence to good coding practices, and proficiency in 
technical documentation are essential. 
## Nice to Haves

## Job Nature
